ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Code for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., FR, SO, JR, SR) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained by the player */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Number of touches by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game stats were added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game stats were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_players, edit_players) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)
